channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-06-03
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: ESAs publish the first report on DORA major ICT-related incidents
item.description: The European Supervisory Authorities (EBA, EIOPA and ESMA) today published their first annual overview of major ICT-related incidents in the EU financial sector based on a reporting mechanism established by the Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA). It shows that ICT risks are increasingly borderless and interconnected. The authorities also note that the recent evolution of highly capable AI-driven tools should encourage financial entities to strengthen cybersecurity measures to maintain their resilience going forward. — Thématique réglementation ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact risques/cyber.

item.title: ​The EBA and the New York State Department of Financial Services sign a Memorandum of Understanding to foster cooperation in the supervision of international stablecoin activities
item.description: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS) under the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA). The agreement aims to strengthen cooperation in the supervision of entities engaged in cross-border stablecoin activities. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.

item.title: The GMTF presents its findings on EU gas and gas derivative markets 02/06/2026 The Gas Market Task Force (GMTF), has published today a
item.description: The Gas Market Task Force (GMTF), has published today a — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (esma news) ; impact marché.

item.title: Frank Elderson: Strengthening operational resilience for the age of AI
item.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (ecb - press / speeches / interviews) ; impact risques/cyber.
